record.field: Ampache is a self-hosted web-based audio and video streaming server that puts your entire media library online, accessible from any device.

Ampache is a self-hosted web-based audio and video streaming server that puts your entire media library online, accessible from any device.

Running since 2001, Ampache catalogs your music and video files, reads their embedded metadata, and serves them through a web player with album art, lyrics and playlists. It exposes both its native Ampache API and the Subsonic/OpenSubsonic API, so it works with dozens of third-party mobile and desktop clients. It targets private and small-group deployments where you want full ownership of your media instead of relying on commercial streaming platforms.

Key features
  • Web-based player with album art, lyrics, playlists and visualizations
  • Subsonic and OpenSubsonic API plus native Ampache API for broad client compatibility
  • On-the-fly transcoding to adapt audio/video to the playback device and bandwidth
  • Multi-user accounts with per-user permissions and optional public registration
  • Podcast subscriptions, catalogs for large libraries and metadata-driven organization
  • Docker deployment with MySQL/MariaDB and multi-language interface
Best for

Individuals, families and small communities who want to stream their own music and video collections from anywhere, and anyone who needs a Subsonic-compatible backend for their favorite mobile or desktop music app.

services: ampache: image: ampache/ampache:latest restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:80' volumes: - ./config:/var/www/config - ./log:/var/log/ampache - ./mysql:/var/lib/mysql - {{ media_path }}:/media container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
